evals.name: workflow-a-basic-upload
evals.prompt: 把這篇文章上傳到 NotebookLM 生成播客 https://example.com/article
evals.expected_output: Creates notebook, adds source with correct syntax, waits for processing, generates audio with --wait, downloads as .mp4
expectations: Uses 'notebooklm create' to create a notebook
Uses 'notebooklm source add' WITHOUT '--wait' flag on source add
Uses 'notebooklm source wait' as a separate command to wait for source processing
Uses 'notebooklm generate audio --wait' for generation
Download file extension is .mp4, NOT .wav

evals.name: workflow-a-video-style
evals.prompt: 把這個網頁做成 retro 風格的影片 https://example.com/data
evals.expected_output: Uses --style retro-print (not retro) for video generation
expectations: Uses '--style retro-print' in the generate video command
Does NOT use '--style retro' (this value does not exist)
Uses 'source wait' instead of 'source add --wait'

evals.name: workflow-b-browse-notebooks
evals.prompt: 我想看看之前的 notebook 有哪些，找一個關於市場分析的
evals.expected_output: Lists notebooks, does NOT create a new one. Uses Workflow B commands.
expectations: Uses 'notebooklm list' to show existing notebooks
Does NOT use 'notebooklm create' (user wants to browse, not create)
Uses 'notebooklm use <id>' to switch to the target notebook

evals.name: workflow-b-ask-question
evals.prompt: 幫我問一下 NotebookLM 上的筆記本，AI 趨勢那個，裡面有沒有提到 transformer architecture
evals.expected_output: Browses notebooks, switches to the right one, asks the question
expectations: Uses 'notebooklm list' to find the notebook
Uses 'notebooklm use <id>' to switch context
Uses 'notebooklm ask' to pose the question

evals.name: workflow-b-download-artifact
evals.prompt: 我之前有生成一個播客，幫我下載
evals.expected_output: Lists notebooks, switches to the right one, lists artifacts, downloads the audio
expectations: Uses 'notebooklm list' or checks current context
Uses 'notebooklm artifact list' to find the generated audio
Uses 'notebooklm download audio' with --latest or specific artifact ID
Download file extension is .mp4, NOT .wav

evals.name: never-list-source-wait
evals.prompt: 上傳這個 PDF 到 NotebookLM ~/Documents/report.pdf
evals.expected_output: Uses source wait as separate command, never source add --wait
expectations: The command sequence includes 'source wait' as a separate step
Does NOT use 'source add --wait' or 'source add "..." --wait' in any command
Confirms notebook name with user before creating

evals.name: slide-revision-zero-based
evals.prompt: 生成完簡報後，幫我修改第一頁的標題
evals.expected_output: Uses --slide 0 for the first slide (zero-based index)
expectations: Uses 'generate slide-deck --wait' first
Uses 'revise-slide' with '--slide 0' for the first slide
Does NOT use '--slide 1' for the first slide

evals.name: generate-async-awareness
evals.prompt: 幫我同時生成報告和播客
evals.expected_output: Acknowledges that generate is async by default, uses --wait appropriately
expectations: Uses '--wait' flag on generate commands
Does NOT assume generate commands block without --wait

evals.name: workflow-decision-ambiguous
evals.prompt: NotebookLM 上那個筆記本幫我加一個新的來源進去 https://example.com/new-article
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is adding to an existing notebook (Workflow B browse first, then A add source)
expectations: Uses 'notebooklm list' to find the existing notebook
Uses 'notebooklm use <id>' to switch to it
Uses 'source add' to add the new source (does NOT create a new notebook)
Uses 'source wait' after adding the source

evals.name: pptx-markitdown-routing
evals.prompt: 把這個 PPTX 上傳到 NotebookLM C:\Users\me\slides.pptx
evals.expected_output: Uses markitdown to convert PPTX first, then source add the converted file
expectations: Uses 'markitdown' to convert the PPTX file to markdown
Does NOT directly 'source add' the .pptx file
Uses 'source add' on the converted markdown file
